title: Use Non-Privileged Accounts or Roles When Accessing Nonsecurity Functions
description: use non-privileged accounts or roles when accessing nonsecurity functions

checks.name: Nonsecurity Functions are Identified
checks.purpose: Identification of nonsecurity functions is a GRC documentation concern on Windows Client and is not technically verifiable via automated check

checks.name: Users are Required to Use Non-Privileged Accounts for Nonsecurity Functions
checks.purpose: Confirm that standard user accounts are used for nonsecurity functions by verifying UAC is enforced, admin accounts are not used for daily tasks, and no standard users hold unnecessary elevated rights

checks.name: Nonsecurity Functions are Identified
checks.purpose: Identification of nonsecurity functions is a GRC documentation concern on Windows Server and is not technically verifiable via automated check

checks.name: Users are Required to Use Non-Privileged Accounts for Nonsecurity Functions
checks.purpose: Confirm that administrative accounts are not used for routine nonsecurity tasks by verifying UAC enforcement, admin account usage patterns, and that Domain Admins are not assigned standard user mailboxes or workstation logins

checks.name: Nonsecurity Functions are Identified
checks.expected_result: Named standard user accounts exist separately from privileged accounts with no standard user holding UID 0 or unrestricted sudo access
checks.purpose: Identify nonsecurity function users by enumerating standard accounts and confirming they are distinct from privileged identities used for security functions

checks.name: Users are Required to Use Non-Privileged Accounts for Nonsecurity Functions
checks.purpose: Confirm that standard users do not have unrestricted sudo access, root login is disabled, and no standard user account is also used as a service or privileged identity

checks.name: Nonsecurity Functions are Identified
checks.expected_result: Named standard user accounts exist separately from privileged accounts with no standard user holding UID 0 or unrestricted sudo access
checks.purpose: Identify nonsecurity function users by enumerating standard accounts and confirming they are distinct from privileged identities used for security functions

checks.name: Users are Required to Use Non-Privileged Accounts for Nonsecurity Functions
checks.purpose: Confirm that standard users do not have unrestricted sudo access, root login is disabled, and no standard user account is also used as a service or privileged identity
